Table DCS_SHIPMENT

Card of table DCS_SHIPMENT

Name

DCS_SHIPMENT

Code

DCS_SHIPMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_SHIPMENT

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_CONSUMERORDER" schema

called "DCS_SHIPMENT".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_SHIPMENT_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ITEMID, SHIPMENTID, MARKET_CODE))

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. Set up the data Load type to "Incremental" where history should be captured and the end result styas deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD1

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_SHIPMENT

CKT_DCS_SHIPMENT


Server validation rule of the table DCS_SHIPMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_SHIPMENT

drop table DCS_SHIPMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_SHIPMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT (
DCS_SHIPMENT_KEY TEXT not null,
SHIPMENTID INTEGER not null,
ITEMID INTEGER not null,
ORDERID INTEGER not null,
PRODUCTID INTEGER,
QUANTITY INTEGER,
TRACKINGNUMBER TEXT,
CARRIER TEXT,
TRACKINGURL TEXT,
SHIPPINGID INTEGER,
ORDERDATE DATE,
SHIPMENTDATE DATE,
CODENTIFYIDS TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_SHIPMENT primary key (DCS_SHIPMENT_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.DCS_SHIPMENT_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.SHIPMENTID is
'Shipment identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.ITEMID is
'DCS order item identifier on order. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.ORDERID is
'Order Identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.PRODUCTID is
'DCS product unique identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.QUANTITY is
'Numbers of item in shipment';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.TRACKINGNUMBER is
'Order products shipment identifier for tracking purpose';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.TRACKINGURL is
'Full URL to track shipment';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.SHIPPINGID is
'Shipping identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.ORDERDATE is
'date when order has placed';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.SHIPMENTDATE is
'Shipment date';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.CODENTIFYIDS is
'Device codentify';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT
add constraint FK_DCS_SHIP_R19_ORDER_DCS_ORDE foreign key (MARKET_CODE)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT
add constraint FK_DCS_SHIP_R6_ORDER__DCS_ORDE foreign key (ORDERID)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_SHIPMENT
add constraint FK_DCS_SHIP_R7_ORDERI_DCS_ORDE foreign key (ITEMID)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM (DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
